diagnosis.recommended_next_step: Use this merged/materialized integrated-service probe as the shared-score on-chip service closure input before any NoC, HBM, physical PPA, SRAM macro timing, or token-energy claim.

selected_scale_point.selection_basis: Largest tested cluster_count, then packet_w, then banks among q4/read_latency=2/round_robin cases; coverage representative only, not a performance or architectural ranking.
